data.title: Dun & Bradstreet Reports Q4 and Full Year 2024 Results
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Dun & Bradstreet Holdings ( (DNB) ) is now available.

Dun & Bradstreet Holdings reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 20, 2025. The company experienced a revenue increase of 0.2% for the fourth quarter and 2.9% for the entire year compared to 2023. Despite a slight decline in adjusted net income for the quarter, Dun & Bradstreet achieved 3% organic revenue growth for the year and expanded EBITDA margins by 30 basis points. The company also reduced its net leverage to 3.6 times, highlighting a focus on capital structure improvement. Moving into 2025, Dun & Bradstreet aims to expand its solution sets and support clients’ needs through data, analytics, and generative AI. The financial outcomes indicate a stable performance with slight growth, suggesting a positive outlook for stakeholders.

More about Dun & Bradstreet Holdings

Dun & Bradstreet is a leading global provider of business decisioning data and analytics, enabling companies to improve their business performance. Their Data Cloud offers solutions that help customers accelerate revenue, lower costs, mitigate risks, and transform businesses. With a history dating back to 1841, Dun & Bradstreet has been relied upon by companies of all sizes to manage risk and discover opportunities.

YTD Price Performance: -14.74%

Average Trading Volume: 2,926,287

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.69B

data.title: Beng Kuang Marine Achieves Remarkable Financial Growth in FY2024
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. ( (SG:BEZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. reported significant financial growth in FY2024, with a 41.3% increase in revenue to S$111.88 million and a 167.7% rise in net profit to S$21.19 million. The company’s strategic shift towards a service-oriented model and the exit of loss-making operations have improved its gross profit margin and strengthened its financial position, enabling a proposed dividend of 0.6 SG cents per share.

More about Beng Kuang Marine Ltd.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. operates within the offshore and marine industry, providing asset integrity solutions and services, particularly for floating assets such as FPSOs and FSOs. The company is focused on an asset-light and service-oriented business model.

YTD Price Performance: 18.18%

Average Trading Volume: 772,534

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

data.title: SolarBank Partners with Viridi for Innovative Solar and Battery Project in Buffalo
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Solarbank Corp. ( (TSE:SUNN) ) has provided an update.

SolarBank Corporation has partnered with Viridi to develop a combined solar power and battery energy storage system in Buffalo, New York. This project, which will be built on a closed landfill site, aims to transform unusable land into a productive asset that generates clean energy for the community. By collaborating with Viridi, known for its innovative and safe battery technology, SolarBank intends to boost its market positioning in the renewable energy space. The project is subject to various approvals and financing but, once operational, will function as a community solar project offering financial savings to local homeowners and renters.

More about Solarbank Corp.

SolarBank Corporation is an independent renewable and clean energy project developer and owner focusing on distributed and community solar projects in Canada and the USA. The company develops solar, Battery Energy Storage System (BESS), and EV Charging projects that sell electricity to utilities, commercial, industrial, municipal, and residential off-takers. SolarBank maximizes returns through a diverse portfolio of projects across multiple leading North American markets.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

First Service Holding Limited ( (HK:2107) ) has shared an update.

First Service Holding Limited announced the successful passage of an ordinary resolution at their Extraordinary General Meeting held on February 20, 2025. The resolution approved the subscriptions of specific wealth management products by the company and its subsidiaries, with more than 50% of shareholders voting in favor. This decision supports the company’s ongoing investment strategies and reflects shareholder confidence in its financial management direction.

data.title: Smartoptics Supports AirFaster’s Coastal Network Expansion with Cost-Efficient Solutions
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Smartoptics Group AS ( (DE:3YL) ) has provided an announcement.

Smartoptics has announced the deployment of its open line systems by AirFaster Telecomunicaciones for a challenging 600 km coastal network in Baja California, Mexico. This deployment is significant as it helps AirFaster overcome geographical challenges with cost-efficient and flexible DWDM connectivity, allowing them to offer competitive services and expand their market presence alongside larger communication service providers.

More about Smartoptics Group AS

Smartoptics is a Scandinavian company founded in 2006 that provides innovative optical networking solutions and devices, focusing on open networking to help customers avoid vendor lock-in, remain flexible, and minimize costs. Their customer base includes enterprises, governments, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, and telecom operators, partnering with technology leaders like Brocade, Cisco, and Dell to deliver solutions for metro and regional network applications.

Rosenbauer International ( (GB:0FRW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Rosenbauer International AG has announced a 50% capital increase of its existing share capital, excluding subscription rights, at an issue price of EUR 35 per share. This capital increase, exclusively subscribed by Robau Beteiligungsverwaltung GmbH, is contingent upon regulatory approvals which have been fulfilled, and is expected to be implemented soon, with trading of the new shares to commence on the Vienna Stock Exchange.

Rosenbauer International AG is a company operating in the manufacturing industry, primarily focusing on producing fire fighting vehicles and equipment. The company is based in Leonding, Austria, and its shares are traded on the Vienna Stock Exchange.

data.title: Beng Kuang Marine Adopts Scrip Dividend Scheme to Enhance Flexibility and Growth
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. ( (SG:BEZ) ) has issued an announcement.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. has announced the adoption of a scrip dividend scheme, allowing shareholders to receive dividends in the form of fully paid-up shares instead of cash. This scheme provides shareholders with greater investment flexibility and benefits the company by retaining cash to strengthen its working capital and fund growth, potentially enhancing its industry position and stakeholder value.

More about Beng Kuang Marine Ltd.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Republic of Singapore, operating in the marine industry. It focuses on providing marine engineering services, including shipbuilding, repair, and maintenance solutions, with a market focus on strengthening its equity capital and supporting growth and expansion initiatives.

Ngai Hing Hong Co. Ltd. ( (HK:1047) ) has provided an update.

Ngai Hing Hong Co. Ltd. announced a significant reduction in losses for the six months ended December 31, 2024, expecting a loss of no more than HK$7.2 million, compared to HK$18.4 million in the previous year. The company attributes this improvement to increased sales volume, turnover, and gross profit margin due to strategic operational enhancements and effective market opportunity capture, despite a volatile global economic environment.

Ngai Hing Hong Co. Ltd. is a company incorporated in Bermuda that operates in the plastics industry. Its primary focus lies in the production and distribution of plastic materials, with a market presence that leverages optimizing its product portfolio and capturing market opportunities.
